cases.name: collect all node name properties into a list
return the size of a collected list of node properties
filter on an aggregate result using WITH and WHERE
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) WITH count(n) as cnt WHERE cnt > 1 RETURN cnt

cases.name: group by node and filter on per-node count
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) WITH n, count(n) as node_count WHERE node_count > 1 RETURN n, node_count

cases.name: sum a numeric node property across all nodes
average a numeric node property across all nodes
minimum of a numeric node property across all nodes
maximum of a numeric node property across all nodes
group nodes by a property and count each group
compute multiple aggregates in a single projection
filter nodes using size() on an array property in WHERE
feed an aggregate result from a WITH stage into a subsequent MATCH
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) WITH count(n) as lim MATCH (o) RETURN o

cases.name: collect node properties in a WITH stage then filter by the collected size
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) WITH n, collect(n.prop) as props WHERE size(props) > 1 RETURN n, props
